name: Princess Ariel Sidekick Flounder Kids' Pillow Buddy - The Disney Collection by Pillowfort™
description: The Princess Ariel Sidekick Flounder Kids' Pillow Buddy from The Disney Collection by Pillowfort™ is great for setting up a Disney theme in your kid's space or surprising them with their favorite character on any occasion. Designed in the shape of Flounder, this pillow buddy makes a cute addition to their space. This pillow is suggested for ages three years and above and helps boost creative thinking.
